description_for_human: Launch unrugable meme tokens on Base. Permanent liquidity, deflationary reactors, carbon retirement.
description_for_model: Unrugable token launchpad on Base (chain 8453) with 49 MCP tools v1.4.0 (npx baselings-mcp). Launching is free (gas only) — one transaction deploys a token with 1B fixed supply, two permanently locked Uniswap V3 pools (TOKEN/Money for Trees at 70% of supply, TOKEN/Meme for Trees at 30%), and a SporeReactorV4 clone. Money for Trees is a USDC-backed deposit receipt whose Aave yield funds tree planting; Meme for Trees (MfT) is a meme token born on Bankr plus open tools and is the network heartbeat that every reactor burns. Every 2 hours a launch reactor fires: core token fees are 50% burned and 50% sent to the launcher's wallet, cross-token Meme fees route 10% upstream and the rest is redeposited as LP; fees cascade bottom-up to ReactorPrimeV3, the terminal that fires last. Agents can: fire_reactor to trigger burn cycles on the reactor network (permissionless, every 2hrs), reactor_timing for optimal fire windows, portfolio_value for wallet tracking, liquidity_depth for pool depth scanning, launch tokens, swap_token (guardrailed, $0.10 max per swap, 60s cooldown), arb_signal to detect cross-pool price discrepancies, get_reactor_list for all reactor states, mft_price for live pricing, or deposit idle USDC into a CommunityLPVaultV4 (deposit/depositFor/withdraw/getInfo) as a self-custodied LP position that earns pool trading fees (variable, not guaranteed) and directs a share of yield to tree planting. API at /api/unrugable/tokenomics returns the full infrastructure breakdown.
